Global Distribution Excellence

Driving Global Trade Through Reliable Distribution Solutions

Turbine Distributors is a premier commodity trading company based in Nairobi, Kenya. We specialize in connecting producers, suppliers, and markets across Africa and beyond through world-class logistics, warehousing, and distribution networks. From sourcing premium commodities to managing complex supply chains, we ensure every shipment arrives on time, every transaction builds trust, and every partnership creates long-term value.

With deep expertise in import-export operations, customs compliance, and international shipping, we bridge the gap between local producers and global buyers. Whether you're a retailer stocking shelves, a manufacturer sourcing raw materials, or an exporter reaching international markets, Turbine Distributors provides the reliability, scale, and market insight you need to succeed.

Worldwide Shipping

Reliable global logistics with partnerships spanning every continent, ensuring your cargo reaches any destination safely and on schedule.

Import & Export

Full documentation support, customs clearance expertise, and compliance management for seamless cross-border commodity trading.

Reliable Supply Chain

Strategically positioned in East Africa's trade hub with warehouse infrastructure and inventory management systems you can depend on.

Local Distribution

Direct presence in Nairobi with efficient last-mile delivery, retail partnerships, and rapid order fulfillment across the region.

Get Started Today
What We Offer

Our Core Commodities

We deal in high-demand commodities across food, agriculture, and industrial sectors — sourced, stored, and delivered with precision.

Edible Oils

Cooking & Vegetable Oil

Sunflower oil, soya bean blended oil, and refined cooking oils in bottles, jerricans, and bulk drums. Available in retail packs and wholesale volumes.

Grains & Cereals

Rice & Grain Supply

Premium rice and grains packed in 50kg sacks, suitable for institutional buyers, retailers, and export markets. Available in large warehouse quantities.

Sweeteners

White Refined Sugar

White refined sugar in 50kg bags for wholesale, retail, and export. Produced to ISO-certified standards, available in high volumes for bulk orders.

Coffee

Green & Roasted Coffee

Premium Kenyan-origin coffee beans — both green (unroasted) and roasted — available for local distribution and international export.

Industrial

Technical Grade Urea

Technical grade urea (46% nitrogen) in 50kg bags for industrial use. Sourced reliably, stored properly, and available for bulk procurement.

Brand Distribution

Branded Products

Authorised distribution of branded commodities including Soja fortified vegetable oil. We supply to supermarkets, wholesale stores, and export buyers.

Our Products

Featured Product Categories

Our inventory spans refined edible oils, premium grains, white sugar, coffee, and industrial fertilizers for buyers across Africa and beyond.

Edible Oils

Cooking & Vegetable Oil

Bulk and retail supplies of sunflower, soya bean, and blended cooking oils.

Grains

Rice & Cereal Products

High-quality rice, maize, and cereal products for wholesale and export.

Sugar

Brown Sugar & White Refined Sugar

ISO-grade sugar suited for food manufacturing, retail, and bulk distribution.

Coffee

Keenan Coffee Beans

Green and roasted coffee with authentic Kenyan quality and export readiness.

Fertilizers

Industrial Urea

Technical grade urea for agricultural and industrial supply chains.

Why Turbine

Built for Scale & Trust

We combine Nairobi's strategic position as East Africa's trade hub with global logistics networks to keep your supply chain running without interruption.

🌐 Global Delivery Network

We deliver to clients worldwide — from local Nairobi retailers to international buyers across Europe, Asia, and the Middle East.

⚡ Fast Order Fulfillment

Our warehouse infrastructure and supplier relationships ensure quick turnaround on orders of any size.

💰 Competitive Wholesale Pricing

By purchasing in volume and optimising logistics, we pass significant savings to our clients.

📋 Full Import/Export Documentation

We handle customs clearance, certificates of origin, phytosanitary certificates, and all trade documentation.

🤝 Trusted Long-Term Partnerships

We build lasting relationships with suppliers and buyers, ensuring consistency, quality, and reliability in every shipment.

Get In Touch

Ready to Start Trading?

Whether you need a bulk quote, want to discuss export requirements, or simply want to know more about our products — our team in Nairobi is ready to assist you.
